title:
ナンパの
あしらい方

script.text:
わーっ！　水があんなに透き通って……！
やっぱり沖縄の海は違いますね！

translations.en:
Ha！ The water is so clear…!
The sea in Okinawa is really different!

script.text:
うん。空もキレイだし、気持ちいいね
南国って感じだ

translations.en:
Yeah‚ the sky is beautiful too.
It feels great. It's like being in a tropical paradise.

script.text:
お待たせしました～。見て下さいこころの
ナイスな小悪魔ボディを――

translations.en:
Sorry for the wait~!
Take a look at my nice little devil body—

script.text:
……って、なんで二人とも服着てるんですか～！？
海水浴に来たんですから、水着に着替えないと～

translations.en:
…Wait‚ why are both of you still wearing clothes!?
We came here to swim‚ so change into your swimsuits!

script.text:
愛ちゃんもほら、着替えて
今こそ鍛えし腹筋の出番です～

translations.en:
Ai-chan‚ come on‚ change too!
It's time to show off our well-trained abs~

script.text:
腹筋の出番って何！？
もう、恥ずかしいこと言わないでよ！

translations.en:
Abs? What's that about!?
Stop saying embarrassing things!

script.text:
……僕も今回はいいや
今はまだ準備期間なんだ

translations.en:
…I think I'll pass this time.
I'm still in the preparation phase.

script.text:
準備期間……？
じゃあいつになったら着るんですか？

translations.en:
Preparation phase…?
When will you wear it?

script.text:
さぁ、三年くらい？
この胸に聞いて

translations.en:
Hmm‚ maybe in about three years?
Ask my chest.

script.text:
ちっちゃくたっていいじゃないですか～
それはそれで特定層に需要があるんですよ

translations.en:
Oh‚ come on‚ it's alright even if they're small!
Besides‚ there's a specific audience that would love that!

script.text:
水着に着替えて来たよ
もう、こころは強引なんだから……

translations.en:
I changed into my swimsuit already.
Seriously‚ KoKoro can be so pushy…

script.text:
ホントだよ。可愛い後輩の頼みだから仕方ないけどさ
……ところで莉央は？　さっきから見当たらないけど

translations.en:
You're right. We can't refuse a request from our cute junior‚ but still…
…By the way‚ where's Rio? I haven't seen her around.

script.text: あっ、あそこ！　いっぱい男の人達に囲まれてる！

translations.en: Oh‚ over there! She's surrounded by lots of guys!

script.text: 道でも聞かれてるのかな？

translations.en: Maybe they're asking her for directions?

script.text:
……その可能性はゼロとは言いませんけど
ほぼ確実にナンパです！　早く助けに行きましょう！

translations.en:
…I wouldn't say the possibility is zero…
But it's almost certain they're trying to hit on her! Let's go help her!

script.text: おねーさん、美人じゃん！

translations.en: Hey‚ miss‚ you're beautiful!

script.text: 俺達と遊びに行こうよ！

translations.en: How about going out with us?

script.text: もう、しつこいわね、行く訳ないでしょ

translations.en: Ugh‚ so persistent. There's no way I'm going with you!

script.text: そんなこと言わないでさ～

translations.en: Come on‚ don't say that!

script.text: ん？　キミ、どこかで見たことあるような……

translations.en: Hm? I feel like I've seen you somewhere…

script.text: どこかでとは、なんですか！　失礼な！

translations.en: What do you mean‚ "somewhere"? How rude!

script.text:
スーパーアイドル、LizNoirの神崎莉央さんを
どこかで見たことあるような……とはなんですか！

translations.en:
She's Rio-san‚ the super idol from LizNoir!
How could you say you've seen her somewhere…?

script.text: そんなやつらには鉄拳制裁です！　カモン、愛ちゃん！

translations.en: I'll deal with those guys! Come on‚ Ai-chan!

script.text: なんで私！？

translations.en: Why me!?

script.text:
戦闘は愛ちゃんが担当です～。え？　こころですか？
か弱い乙女なので後ろに下がって通報しますね～

translations.en:
Ai-chan will handle the fighting~. Huh? Me?
I'm just a fragile girl‚ so I'll stand back and call for help~

script.text: ちょっ！　待って下さい！　もう行きますから！

translations.en: Hey‚ wait! We'll leave already!

script.text: ……こころ、貴方……

translations.en: …KoKoro‚ you…

script.text:
どうしました？　ピンチにさっそうと駆け付けた
こころの雄姿に、ハートを奪われちゃいましたか？

translations.en:
What's wrong? I rushed over here as soon as I heard there was a pinch.
Have you fallen for the heroic sight of Kokoro? Have I stolen your heart?

script.text:
バカ、違うわよ。貴方が大声で私の名前を叫ぶから
見なさい、人だかりが……

translations.en:
Idiot‚ that's not it. It's because you called my name so loudly.
Look‚ there's a crowd gathering…

script.text: 莉央、行こう。このままじゃ身動きがとれなくなる

translations.en: Rio‚ let's go. We won't be able to move if we stay here.

script.text: あれ～？　待ってくださ～い

translations.en: Aww~ Wait for me~!

script.text:
はぁ、こういうのがあるから夏の海は嫌なのよ……
もう十回は声を掛けられたわ

translations.en:
Ugh‚ this is why I hate summer beaches…
I've already been approached ten times.

script.text:
くぅ～！　さすが莉央さんですっ
さりげなくモテアピールするあざとさが素敵ですぅ～

translations.en:
Wow‚ as expected from Rio-san.
That subtle way of appealing to men is amazing~.

script.text:
あざとくなんかないわよ！
はぁ……海はキレイだけど、これじゃ全然集中出来ない

translations.en:
There's nothing subtle about it!
Sigh… The beach is beautiful‚ but I can't concentrate at all like this.

script.text:
曲のイメージなんて浮かばないわ
……やっぱり、もう帰らない？

translations.en:
I can't even imagine the image for my new song.
…Should I just go home already?

script.text:
え？　せっかく来たんですから、もう少し遊び――
じゃなかった、アイデアを練りましょうよ～

translations.en:
Huh? We came all this way‚ so let's play a bit…
Oops‚ I mean‚ let's brainstorm some ideas~.

script.text:
そんな時間は……
あら？　葵と愛は？

translations.en:
We don't have time for that…
Oh? Where are Aoi and Ai?

script.text:
だから、知らない男の人に
ついて行ったらダメなんですよ！

translations.en:
I told you not to follow strange men!
Aoi-san‚ you shouldn't go with them just because they offered to treat you to shaved ice.

script.text:
どうして？　かき氷を奢ってくれるって言ってたのに
行かないと損じゃない？

translations.en:
Why not? They said they would treat me‚
so wouldn't I be losing out if I didn't go?

script.text:
だから、それがナンパなんです
葵さん、女の子なんですからもっと注意して下さいね

translations.en:
That's what we call "Hunting".
Aoi-san‚ since you're a girl‚ please be more careful.

script.text:
そうか、さっき僕はナンパされてたのか
分からなかったよ

translations.en:
Oh‚ I see. So I was being hit on earlier.
I didn't realize.

script.text:
葵さん、すっごいモテますね
やっぱりキレイだから……憧れちゃいます

translations.en:
Aoi-san‚ you're very popular.
Your beauty is truly admirable… I look up to you.

script.text: そうかな？　僕は愛の方がキレイだと思うけど

translations.en: Do you think so? I think you're the beautiful one‚ Ai.

script.text:
……あはは、ありがとうございます
お世辞でも嬉しいです

translations.en:
…Haha‚ thank you.
Even if it's flattery‚ I'm happy to hear it.

script.text:
それじゃ、私のそばを離れないで下さいね
私が葵さんをガードしますから！

translations.en:
Well then‚ please stay by my side.
I'll guard you‚ Aoi-san!

script.text:
あっちも大変そうね……
葵はああいうことには無頓着だから

translations.en:
They seem to be having a hard time over there…
Aoi is indifferent to this kind of thing.

script.text: 同感です～。莉央さん、私達も行きましょう

translations.en: I totally agree~. Rio-san‚ let's go too.

script.text: え？　どこに行くのよ？

translations.en: Huh? Where are we going?

script.text:
あっちで沖縄の海を満喫するんです
きっと新曲のアイデアがどんどん浮かんできますよ～

translations.en:
We're going to fully enjoy the sea in Okinawa over there.
I'm sure we'll come up with lots of ideas for the new song~.

script.text:
あっ、ちょっと、こころ引っ張らないでよ
もう……はしゃいじゃって……

translations.en:
Hey‚ wait‚ Kokoro‚ don't pull me like that.
Geez‚ you're getting all excited…

script.text: スイカ割り、初めてやったけど楽しかったね！

translations.en: Playing watermelon smashing was fun‚ even though it was my first time!

script.text:
こころは、みんなでシュノーケリングしたのが
一番楽しかったです。可愛いお魚も見れましたし

translations.en:
For me‚ the most enjoyable part was snorkeling with everyone.
We got to see cute little fish too.

script.text: うん、確かに楽しくはあったんだけど……

translations.en: Yeah‚ it was fun‚ but…

script.text:
結局、新曲のアイデアはさっぱりね
これじゃ、ただ遊んだだけよ

translations.en:
In the end‚ we didn't get any new song ideas at all.
It feels like we just played around.

script.text:
さ、もう十分でしょ
早くしないと、飛行機に乗り遅れるわ

translations.en:
Well‚ that's enough.
We should hurry or we'll miss the flight.

script.text:
そうですね……。こころ、ロッカーに預けた貴重品
一緒に取りに行こうよ

translations.en:
You're right… KoKoro‚
let's go together to get the valuable items we left in the locker.

script.text:
え～っ、もう帰るつもりですか？
この後はバーベキューとか――あれ？

translations.en:
Aww‚ are we leaving already?
We could have had a barbecue later or— Wait a second?

script.text: どうしたのよ？

translations.en: What's wrong?

script.text:
ロッカーの鍵を失くしちゃったみたいです
………………てへっ♪

translations.en:
It seems like I lost the key to the locker…
…………… Oopsie! ♪

script.text: ええええぇ！？

translations.en: Eeeeh!?

script.text:
どうして、こんな目に……お金もスマホもなしじゃ
東京に帰るどころじゃないわ……

translations.en:
Why did this have to happen… Without money and our smartphones‚
there's no way we can return to Tokyo…

script.text:
いや～～参りましたねぇ
まさかロッカーの管理会社の人がもう帰ってるなんて

translations.en:
Oh my‚ this is just terrible.
Who would've thought the staff from the locker company would leave already?

script.text:
ええと、ホテルへの帰り道は、どっちだったかしら
……あっち？

translations.en:
Um‚ which way was the hotel again?
…That way?

script.text:
違うよ莉央。あっちに行ったらビーチに戻っちゃう
僕達、今完全に迷子だよね。……お腹減ったな

translations.en:
No‚ Rio‚ that way leads back to the beach.
We're completely lost now… I'm getting hungry.

script.text:
はぁ～……今夜は野宿かしらね、葵
……葵？　ちょっと、この子、空腹で倒れてる！？

translations.en:
Sigh… Looks like we might end up camping tonight‚ Aoi.
…Aoi? Wait‚ this girl here‚ she fainted from hunger!?

script.text:
ううっ……私とこころのせいだ……
先輩達と遊びたくて、帰るのを引き延ばしたから……

translations.en:
Ugh… It's my fault and KoKoro's fault…
I kept delaying going back because I wanted to play with everyone…

script.text:
なんとか寝る場所と食事の確保をしないと――あっ
あの看板、見て下さい！

translations.en:
We need to find a place to sleep and get some food… Oh!
Look at that sign!

script.text:
キャンプ場？
愛ちゃん、ナイスです～。今夜はそこに泊りましょう

translations.en:
A campsite?
Nice find‚ Ai-chan. Let's stay there tonight.

script.text:
……ホテルまでたどり着けるかも怪しいし
それも仕方ないわね……

translations.en:
…It's doubtful whether we can even make it back to the hotel.
I guess we have no choice…

script.text: でも僕達、お金ないけど

translations.en: But we don't have money.

script.text:
ぬあっ！　葵さんご無事でっ！　ここはお任せ下さい～
こころの交渉力で料金は後払いにしてみせます

translations.en:
Fear not! Aoi-san‚ leave it to me!
With my negotiating skills‚ I'll arrange to pay later.

script.text:
わ、私も行きます！
絶対に先輩方を野宿なんてさせませんから！

translations.en:
I'll come with you!
I won't let our senpais spend the night outdoors!

script.text: どうする？　莉央

translations.en: What do you think‚ Rio?

script.text: はぁ……仕方ないわね

translations.en: Sigh… I guess there's no helping it.

script.text:
二人とも、待ちなさい！
みんなで事情を話して、泊めさせてもらいましょう

translations.en:
Hey‚ you two‚ wait!
Let's all explain our situation and ask if we can stay there.
